zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Stourton於1401年出生在英國多瑟特普雷斯頓時，她的父親Sir John De Stourton MP17歲，母親Joan Banastre22歲。她於1422年4月19日與John Hill在英國薩默塞特斯帕斯頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1472年4月19日在英國薩默塞特斯帕斯頓享年71歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特瑟其姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Stourton于1401年出生在英国多瑟特普雷斯頓时，她的父亲Sir John De Stourton MP17岁，母亲Joan Banastre22岁。她于1422年4月19日与John Hill在英国薩默塞特斯帕斯頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1472年4月19日在英国薩默塞特斯帕斯頓享年71岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特瑟其姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Stourton was born in 1401, in Preston, Dorset, England, her father, Sir John De Stourton MP, was 17 and her mother, Joan Banastre, was 22. She married John Hill on 19 April 1422, in Spaxton, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 19 April 1472, in Spaxton, Somerset, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Sedgemoor, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Stourton est née en 1401, à Preston, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John De Stourton MP, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Joan Banastre, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Hill le 19 avril 1422, à Spaxton, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 avril 1472, à Spaxton, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Sedgemoor, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily Stourton 1401 in Preston, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John De Stourton MP 17 und ihre Mutter Joan Banastre 22. Sie hat am 19. April 1422 in Spaxton, Somerset, England John Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. April 1472 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Spaxton, Somerset, England und wurde in Sedgemoor, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Stourton è nata il nel 1401 nel Preston, Dorset, England, sua padre, Sir John De Stourton MP, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Joan Banastre, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John Hill il 19 aprile 1422, nel Spaxton, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 aprile 1472, nel Spaxton, Somerset, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Sedgemoor, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Stourtonが1401年にイギリスドールセトプレストンで生まれた時，父Sir John De Stourton MPは17歳，母Joan Banastreは22歳であった。1422年4月19日にイギリスソメルセトスプアクストンでJohn Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1472年4月19日にイギリスソメルセトスプアクストンで71歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトセジェモオルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Stourton(이)가 1401년 영국 도르세트 플레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John De Stourton MP(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Banastre(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1422년 4월 19일 영국 서머세트 스파스턴에서 John Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1472년 4월 19일 영국 서머세트 스파스턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 세지모어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Stourton nasceu em 1401, em Preston, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John De Stourton MP, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Joan Banastre, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Hill em 19 de abril de 1422, em Spaxton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de abril de 1472, em Spaxton, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Sedgemoor, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ro.Second Battle of St Albans, St Albans, H: St Albans, Hertfordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Stourton родилась в 1401 г. в местности престон, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John De Stourton MP было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Banastre, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hill 19 апреля 1422 г. в местности спакстон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 19 апреля 1472 г. в местности спакстон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности седжемур, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily Stourton nació en 1401, en Preston, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John De Stourton MP, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Joan Banastre, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John Hill el 19 de abril de 1422, en Spaxton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de abril de 1472, en Spaxton, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Sedgemoor, Somerset, Inglaterra.
